economic_notes: Ashcroft Indian Band Development LLP is a government business partnership (99.99% owned) accounted for by modified equity method. LLP revenue was $8,518,310 with net income of $124,003. LLP has a partners' deficiency of $946,123. Band guaranteed LLP bank loan of $2,753,651.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to determine appropriate accounting treatment for investment in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (cost vs modified equity basis). Fiscal year is 2022, not 2024 as template default. Ashcroft Indian Band Holding Corporation is consolidated subsidiary. Ashcroft Indian Band Development LLP is a GBE accounted for by modified equity method with a partners' deficiency of $946,123. expenses_salaries_total taken from expenses by object (wages and benefits $892,544); segment disclosure shows wages & benefits of $846,061 which excludes honoraria. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($2,242,839) + First Nations Health Authority ($387,457) + Province of BC ($616,800) = $3,247,096 (slight rounding: $3,246,496 per revenue lines). No schedule of remuneration provided. osr = total revenue minus government transfers = 4,967,659 - 3,246,096 = 1,721,163.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
